description_long: This is a life-sized bust of a man mounted atop a tall, rectangular stone pedestal. The bust is finely detailed, showing realistic facial features and a short hairstyle, and is sculpted from a material that appears to be gray stone or concrete. The pedestal is inscribed with Cyrillic text, including a name and dates, suggesting it is a commemorative monument. The base of the pedestal is tiered, with several steps leading up to the main column, and the entire structure sits on a square stone platform surrounded by a patch of grass. The surface of the sculpture is matte and slightly rough, typical of carved stone, and the overall form is solid and imposing. The monument is likely intended for outdoor display in a public or memorial setting.
description: A realistic stone bust of a man on a tall, inscribed pedestal, set on a square stone base with a grassy border. The sculpture is detailed and commemorative, with a matte, slightly rough surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed bust, facial features, and the inscribed text on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the unadorned side of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head and the plain back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the profile of the bust and the unmarked side of the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: Outdoor setting with a stone base surrounded by grass, likely in a park or memorial area.
